GpuProjectExec: expr=[avg(store_sales.ss_quantity)@0 as avg1, avg(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@1 as avg2, avg(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost)@2 as avg3, sum(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost)@3 as sum(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost)]
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[avg(store_sales.ss_quantity), avg(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price), avg(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost), sum(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[avg(store_sales.ss_quantity), avg(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price), avg(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost), sum(store_sales.ss_ext_wholesale_cost)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012
          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3, 4]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                  GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_year@1 = 2001, projection=[0]
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=7255012
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(ca_address_sk@0, ss_addr_sk@1)], filter=(ca_state@1 = TX OR ca_state@1 = OH) AND ss_net_profit@0 >= Some(10000),7,2 AND ss_net_profit@0 <= Some(20000),7,2 OR (ca_state@1 = OR OR ca_state@1 = NM OR ca_state@1 = KY) AND ss_net_profit@0 >= Some(15000),7,2 AND ss_net_profit@0 <= Some(30000),7,2 OR (ca_state@1 = VA OR ca_state@1 = TX OR ca_state@1 = MS) AND ss_net_profit@0 >= Some(5000),7,2 AND ss_net_profit@0 <= Some(25000),7,2, projection=[2, 4, 5, 6]

                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ca_address_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012

                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=7255012
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_addr_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012

                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([hd_demo_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=7255012

                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7255012
                                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(cd_demo_sk@0, ss_cdemo_sk@1)], filter=cd_marital_status@1 = M AND cd_education_status@2 = Advanced Degree AND ss_sales_price@0 >= Some(10000),7,2 AND ss_sales_price@0 <= Some(15000),7,2 OR cd_marital_status@1 = S AND cd_education_status@2 = College AND ss_sales_price@0 >= Some(5000),7,2 AND ss_sales_price@0 <= Some(10000),7,2 OR cd_marital_status@1 = W AND cd_education_status@2 = 2 yr Degree AND ss_sales_price@0 >= Some(15000),7,2 AND ss_sales_price@0 <= Some(20000),7,2, projection=[1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11]
